# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2019-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Web/locations/', parameters('location'), '/hostingEnvironments/', variables('hostingEnvironmentName'))]"
      },
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'Storage')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('storageBlobDataContributorRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-09-01-preview').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'KeyVault')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('keyVaultContributorRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>icrosoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-09-01-preview').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'SQL')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('sqlServerContributorRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-09-01-preview').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'CosmosDB')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('cosmosAccountContributorRoleId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-09-01-preview').identity.principalId]"
      }
